title: Assist with soil or growing media sampling and testing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with soil or growing media sampling and testing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect soil or media samples for testing

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor soil or growing media to be sampled
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor soil or growing media to be sampled?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor soil or growing media to be sampled.

pcs.text: Select soil or growing media sampling tools and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select soil or growing media sampling tools and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select soil or growing media sampling tools and materials.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow environmental and biosecurity procedures when sampling and testing soil and growing media, to minimise impact.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples as instructed.

pcs.text: Assist with labelling and recording samples as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with labelling and recording samples as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with labelling and recording samples as required.
